sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Visa (NYSE: V) CEO sells 20,970 shares in Rule 10b5-1 trade
feed.summary: Visa CEO Ryan McInerney reported an exercise and sale of 20,970 shares of Class A Common Stock. The shares were acquired through employee stock options at $109.82 per share and then sold in an open-market transaction at a weighted average price of $340.2464 per share, as part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After these transactions, McInerney directly holds 15,174 shares and indirectly holds 265,168 shares through a trust.

feed.title: CoStar Group (CSGP) Fell Despite Solid Results
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) shares fell despite the company reporting solid Q4 2025 results and reiterating 2026 guidance, as net new bookings were slightly below buy-side expectations. TimesSquare Capital U.S. Mid Cap Growth Strategy noted the company's strong core business trends and accelerating profitability but highlighted a 40% stock tumble in the quarter. Despite 62 hedge funds holding CSGP, the firm suggests other AI stocks may offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: TimesSquare Mid Cap Growth Strategy Exited HubSpot (HUBS) Due to AI Disruption Concerns
feed.summary: TimesSquare Capital Management's Mid Cap Growth Strategy exited its position in HubSpot (HUBS) during the first quarter of 2026, citing concerns over potential AI disruption and challenges to HubSpot's seat-based model. The software company's stock experienced a significant decline of 43% before the sale. While acknowledging HubSpot's risks, the strategy suggests that other AI stocks offer greater potential for higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Which 2026 Honda Civic Should You Buy? Every Trim Explained
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive guide to the 2026 Honda Civic lineup, detailing each trim level from the entry-level LX to the high-performance Type R. It highlights the features, pricing, and target audience for each variant, including the efficient Sport Hybrid and the enthusiast-focused Si. The author ultimately recommends the Sport Hybrid as the best balance of features, power, and fuel economy for most buyers, while acknowledging the Type R for track enthusiasts.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group’s Q2 results land July 27; call follows July 28
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (Nasdaq: PFG) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after U.S. markets close on Monday, July 27, 2026. A live conference call will be held on Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 10 a.m. ET, featuring Deanna Strable and Joel Pitz. Additional information, including the earnings release, supplement, and slides, will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Gartner Predicts 20% of Finance Organizations Will Pivot All Talent-related Investments to Advanced Digital Capabilities by 2028
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2028, 20% of finance organizations will reallocate all talent investments toward advanced digital capabilities, stopping the hiring and development of non-digitally literate talent. This shift is driven by the increasing integration of AI in finance, prompting CFOs to focus on building sophisticated technical skills within their existing digitally literate workforce. The move will lead to significant changes in finance roles, hiring practices, and employee development, with a strong emphasis on continuous digital upskilling and a potential decrease in traditional finance positions.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin to webcast Q2 results before market opens July 23
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) announced it will host a live webcast of its second-quarter 2026 earnings results conference call on Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The earnings results, slides, and financial charts will be posted before market open that day. A replay of the webcast will be available through August 6, 2026.

feed.title: Uncrustables® Sandwiches Are Now Fridge Friendly Nationwide: Buy Them Frozen. Store Them Your Way -- In Your Fridge or Freezer at Home
feed.summary: Uncrustables sandwiches are now "fridge friendly" nationwide, allowing consumers to store them in the refrigerator for up to five days for immediate enjoyment, or keep them frozen for longer. The J.M. Smucker Co. announced this change in response to consumer demand for greater convenience. The product itself, including the recipe and "Unbeatably Soft Bread," remains the same and will continue to be sold in the freezer aisle.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line to Webcast Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) announced it will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, before trading opens. A conference call to discuss these results and the company's outlook will be held at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, with an online webcast available at ir.odfl.com. The webcast and a telephonic replay will be available for approximately 30 days and one week, respectively, after the call.

feed.title: P&G to Webcast Discussion of Fourth Quarter 25/26 Earnings Results on July 29
feed.summary: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE: PG) announced it will webcast a discussion of its fourth-quarter earnings results on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Investors and media can access the live audio webcast, and subsequent replay, on the company's investor website. This announcement provides key information for stakeholders interested in P&G's financial performance.

feed.title: MetLife Investment Management Names Chris Aiken Head of Real Estate Equity Strategies
feed.summary: MetLife Investment Management (MIM) has appointed Chris Aiken as the new head of Real Estate Equity Strategies. Aiken will lead MIM’s direct property investment platform and oversee investing activities for MetLife’s general account and third-party institutional investors across various real estate strategies. This appointment follows Andrea Drasites' promotion to global head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance, showcasing MIM's continued investment in its real estate capabilities and leadership team.

feed.title: AI, cloud drive Verizon/BT Group joint venture
feed.summary: Verizon and BT Group have formed a 50-50 joint venture, combining their international holdings into an entity focused on a "cloud-first world in the age of AI." This new venture is expected to serve over 3,000 customers in more than 180 countries, with combined annual revenues of approximately $4 billion. The collaboration aims to maximize revenue from international endeavors for both companies while maintaining focus on their domestic markets.

feed.title: Federal Realty Appoints Paige Pitcher to Lead AI and Digital Innovation Strategy
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust has appointed Paige Pitcher as Senior Vice President of Digital Innovation, a new executive role focused on integrating AI and digital technologies across the company's operations. Pitcher will lead the applied AI and technology strategy to improve speed, efficiency, and decision-making in leasing, operations, and investment activities. This move highlights a growing trend among real estate companies to leverage digital tools for enhanced performance and competitive differentiation.

feed.title: Marriott Makes Coca-Cola New Global Beverage Partner
feed.summary: Marriott International has partnered with The Coca-Cola Company to make it their new global beverage partner. This agreement will introduce Coca-Cola's wide range of beverages across Marriott's hotels worldwide, including guestrooms, restaurants, lounges, and event spaces. The phased rollout of these products began on Wednesday and will continue globally in the coming months.

feed.title: T Stamp Inc (IDAI) director awarded 1,582 Class A share-based units
feed.summary: T Stamp Inc. director Charles Edward Potts was granted 1,582 derivative awards on Class A Common Stock on June 30, 2026, as reported in a recent Form 4 SEC filing. These compensation-related awards, with a conversion price of $0.00 per share, increase his direct holdings to 19,853 shares or equivalents. The transaction is categorized as a grant or acquisition rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Fluke 117 Electrician’s Multimeter from Fortive Corp. - Compact tool built for US job sites
feed.summary: The article reviews the Fluke 117 Electrician’s Multimeter, a compact and safety-rated tool designed for professional electricians and maintenance crews in the US. Manufactured by Fortive Corp., the multimeter features non-contact voltage detection (VoltAlert), true RMS measurement, and low-input impedance (LoZ), making it suitable for practical, one-handed use on typical US job sites. It is positioned as a reliable, mid-to-high-range instrument within Fortive's broader test and measurement portfolio, supporting recurring revenue from trade professionals.

feed.title: Loews Corp (L) director receives 223-share quarterly stock grant under 2025 plan
feed.summary: Loews Corp director Charles D. Davidson received a quarterly grant of 223 shares of common stock under the company's 2025 Incentive Compensation Plan. This transaction, awarded at no purchase price as part of director compensation, brings his total direct holdings to 29,285.6 common shares. The filing indicates a "grant, award, or other acquisition" transaction, not a market buy or sale.

feed.title: CoStar Group To Buy About 30% Stake In Wikicasa
feed.summary: CoStar Group is set to acquire approximately a 30% stake in Wikicasa. This news was reported by Reuters and is available through TradingView News Search, indicating a significant investment in the real estate tech sector. Further details would require signing up to read the full report.

feed.title: Form 4 Loews Corp For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 4 for Loews Corp for July 1st, as reported by Investing.com. It provides no further details on the content of the Form 4, serving primarily as a brief news alert. The article is surrounded by extensive financial market data, news headlines, and navigational elements.

feed.title: How John Deere steeps its brand story in its American heritage
feed.summary: John Deere, an iconic American brand founded in 1837, is leveraging its deep heritage to connect with new generations of consumers. Despite the evolving agricultural landscape and younger demographics moving away from farming, the company emphasizes innovation and trustworthiness in its marketing. Through strategic partnerships with MLB, engagement on TikTok, and participation in America250 celebrations, John Deere aims to reinforce its American identity and appeal to a broader audience while navigating potential political sensitivities by focusing on customer-centric stories.

feed.title: Gorilla Technology Completes Acquisition of Shackleton Finance and Launches Gorilla Tech Capital
feed.summary: Gorilla Technology Group Inc. has successfully acquired Shackleton Finance Limited, creating Gorilla Tech Capital. This new regulated capital platform will focus on mobilizing institutional capital for AI infrastructure, data centers, and GPU-as-a-Service projects, aiming to fund Gorilla's growth without relying on dilutive equity financing. The initiative is designed to provide institutional investors with access to next-generation digital infrastructure opportunities through a governance-led platform.

feed.title: Loews (L) director Jonathan C. Locker gets 223-share quarterly stock grant
feed.summary: Loews (L) director Jonathan C. Locker received a quarterly grant of 223 shares of common stock as part of his director compensation, awarded at $0.00 per share under the Loews Corporation 2025 Incentive Compensation Plan. Following this transaction, Locker directly holds a total of 25,448 shares of Loews common stock. This Form 4 filing indicates an acquisition but no sales by the director.

feed.title: REG - Franklin Resources SEGRO PLC - Form 8.3 - Segro Plc
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. has disclosed its opening position in Segro Plc on June 30, 2026, as required by Rule 8.3 of the Takeover Code. The disclosure shows Franklin Resources, Inc. holds 5,735,008 ordinary shares, representing 0.42% of Segro Plc. Additionally, the filing indicates Franklin Resources, Inc. is making disclosures in respect of Prologis, Inc. as well.

feed.title: Loews Corp (L) director granted 223-share stock award
feed.summary: Loews Corp director Susan Peters received a grant of 223 shares of common stock as part of her regular director compensation under the 2025 Incentive Compensation Plan. This transaction, reported via a Form 4 filing, was a compensation-related increase in her ownership rather than an open-market purchase, bringing her direct holdings to 3,051 Loews common shares. The grant price per share was $0.00, indicating it was purely a compensatory award.

feed.title: Analysts Are Bullish on These Technology Stocks: ServiceNow (NOW), Tyler Technologies (TYL)
feed.summary: BTIG and Oppenheimer analysts have issued bullish ratings for ServiceNow (NOW) and Tyler Technologies (TYL) respectively. BTIG maintained a Buy rating on ServiceNow with a $150.00 price target, while Oppenheimer reiterated a Buy rating on Tyler Technologies with a $450.00 price target. Both companies also hold strong buy consensus ratings from the street, indicating significant upside potential from current levels.

feed.title: Is Graphic Packaging Holding (GPK) Cheap Following Class Action Lawsuits And Weak 2025 Results?
feed.summary: Graphic Packaging Holding (GPK) is facing scrutiny due to class-action lawsuits alleging misleading disclosures and weak 2025 results, alongside a recent CEO change. Despite a 49.95% decline in its one-year total shareholder return, the stock is trading at a discount to its estimated intrinsic value, with a fair value of $11.79 compared to its current price of $10.57. The company's investment in recycled paperboard is expected to improve margins and long-term earnings, but legal and competitive pressures remain key risks.

feed.title: BMO Capital Maintains Amgen(AMGN.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $400
feed.summary: BMO Capital has reiterated its Buy rating on Amgen (AMGN.US) and maintained its target price at $400. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding Amgen's stock performance.

feed.title: Micron, GM sign semiconductor supply agreement for vehicles
feed.summary: Micron Technology and General Motors have signed a supply agreement for memory and storage platforms for vehicle production. This deal helps automakers bolster their semiconductor supply chains due to increasing computing needs in modern vehicles. Micron's expanding U.S. manufacturing footprint, including a modernized Virginia plant, will support the agreement, which is one of 16 strategic customer agreements outlined by Micron in its third quarter.

feed.title: Evernorth Launches Pharmacy Forward: A Simpler, Faster Specialty Pharmacy Experience for Patients Managing Complex Conditions
feed.summary: Evernorth, a division of The Cigna Group, has launched "Pharmacy Forward," an AI-powered program aimed at simplifying and accelerating the specialty pharmacy experience for patients with complex conditions. The program, backed by a $100 million investment, integrates AI across clinical care, prescription intake, administration, and medication fulfillment to improve adherence, streamline processes, and enhance patient support, initially through Accredo Specialty Pharmacy. It is expected to generate approximately $400 million in value by the end of 2028 and will be extended to other Evernorth pharmacies.

feed.title: Director William McClintock receives 52 RSUs in T Stamp Inc (IDAI)
feed.summary: T Stamp Inc. director William McClintock was granted 52 restricted stock units (RSUs) at a price of $0.00 per unit, representing shares of Class A Common Stock issued upon vesting. This compensation-related equity award increased his direct holdings of restricted stock units to 312. The transaction is a routine equity award, not an open-market purchase or sale, and reflects standard director compensation practices.

feed.title: HUB Cyber Security (Nasdaq: HUBC) issues 31.6M shares for Evofem stake
feed.summary: HUB Cyber Security (HUBC) announced it is acquiring senior subordinated convertible notes and purchase rights of Evofem Biosciences, Inc. (EVFM) in a "zero-cash" transaction. HUB will issue 31.6 million consideration shares, comprising ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants, to fund the approximately $49.3 million acquisition. This move gives HUB potential ownership of up to 88% of Evofem's current outstanding shares while preserving HUB's liquidity, and is part of a broader restructuring effort for HUB, which includes significant headcount reductions and engaging Deloitte for financial planning.

feed.title: GH - Guardant Health Inc Options
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed financial overview of Guardant Health Inc. (GH), including its stock performance, key financial metrics, analyst recommendations, and insider activity. It highlights the company's valuation ratios, growth rates, and market statistics as of its last close on June 30.

feed.title: Mexico Courts BlackRock, KKR to Ramp Up Infrastructure Projects
feed.summary: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum’s government is actively engaging with major asset managers like BlackRock, KKR, and Macquarie Asset Management to boost private investment in infrastructure projects. These meetings, which included discussions with pension funds, aim to establish a framework for potential projects, particularly in energy and highways. Despite previous delays in attracting significant private capital, a recent increase in private investment within the electricity sector and new legislation to streamline investments signal growing momentum.

feed.title: Nuveen, TIAA and Principal® Expand Access to Guaranteed Lifetime Income, Marking the Milestone with Bobby Bonilla on His Annual Payday
feed.summary: Nuveen, TIAA, and Principal Financial Group are expanding access to guaranteed lifetime income solutions for retirement plans by making the Nuveen Lifecycle Income Index CIT Series (NLI) available on Principal's platform. This initiative, celebrated with former MLB player Bobby Bonilla on his annual deferred compensation payday, aims to provide everyday workers with reliable income options in retirement, similar to a fixed annuity. The NLI combines a target-date fund structure with the TIAA Secure Income Account, offering guaranteed growth and the option to convert savings into lifetime income.

feed.title: Eversource closes on $2.4 billion Aquarion sale. Here's what it means to customers
feed.summary: Eversource Energy has completed the $2.4 billion sale of Aquarion Water Co. to the South Central Connecticut Regional Water Authority. This transition will convert Aquarion into a quasi-public utility, giving the 60 municipalities it serves a direct voice in water rates and planning through a Representative Policy Board. While service will continue uninterrupted with no immediate rate increases, customers can expect significant rate hikes starting in 2027, eventually leading to an 82% increase in bills over nine years.

feed.title: ServiceNow rises as Guggenheim upgrades to Buy (NOW:NYSE)
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NOW) shares increased by 4.5% in premarket trading after Guggenheim upgraded the enterprise software maker's stock to Buy from Neutral. The investment firm believes the current price levels offer an attractive opportunity.

feed.title: Federal Realty appoints Paige Pitcher as SVP of digital innovation By Investing.com
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust has appointed Paige Pitcher as Senior Vice President of Digital Innovation. In this newly created role, Pitcher will lead the company's AI and technology strategy across various functions, reporting directly to the President and CEO. This strategic hire follows a strong first quarter for Federal Realty and multiple analyst upgrades, indicating a positive growth trajectory for the company.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Is The Best Travel Stock To Buy As Citi Raises Price Target
feed.summary: Citi raised its price target for Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) to $25 from $21, reiterating a Buy rating, due to falling fuel prices following the Iran deal, which could reduce operating costs. Despite this positive outlook, NCLH lowered its full-year 2026 net yield forecast to a 3% to 5% fall and adjusted EPS guidance to $1.45 to $1.79, partly due to increased fuel prices from Middle East conflict. The company is investing in a new water park at Great Stirrup Cay, set to open in late summer 2026, to drive future demand.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (BKN) Has Significant Upside According To Analysts As Oil Prices Decline
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: BKNG) is seen as having significant upside potential by some analysts, with BTIG reaffirming a Buy rating and a 37% upside target. However, Bernstein maintained a Hold rating, citing potential threats from AI to the online travel agency business model. The company's strong long-term execution and scale have allowed it to outperform the travel industry, but the future impact of AI on hotel distribution remains a key consideration.

feed.title: GreenPower (NASDAQ: GP) completes US$1.425M third tranche of Series A convertible preferred financing
feed.summary: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. (NASDAQ: GP) has completed the third tranche of its Series A Convertible Preferred Share financing, raising US$1.425 million through the issuance of 1,500 shares to an institutional investor. The company also amended its agreement to increase the aggregate stated value of Series A Convertible Preferred Shares issuable by an additional US$2 million, expanding its financing capacity. This financing structure includes a potential for future equity dilution as preferred shares are convertible into common shares based on a formula tied to stated value and NASDAQ closing price.

feed.title: HCW Biologics (HCWB) clears $2.8M disputes and $1.1M lien
feed.summary: HCW Biologics (HCWB) announced the settlement and extinguishment of $2.8 million in disputed accounts payable, which will be recorded in the quarter ending June 30, 2026. This includes the resolution of a legal dispute with B&I Contractors, leading to the removal of a $1.1 million mechanics’ lien on its Miramar property. Additionally, the company finalized a settlement with EirGenix, Inc., reducing amounts owed from $1.7 million to $1.2 million, which has been fully paid.

feed.title: Prologis Appoints Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) has appointed Alfred F. Kelly, Jr. to its board of directors. Kelly previously served as CEO of Visa Inc. and held senior leadership roles at American Express Company. His extensive experience in technology, risk, and global markets is expected to be a valuable asset to Prologis's board.

feed.title: PepsiCo says 4.7 million acres now use regenerative practices
feed.summary: PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP) announced significant progress towards its 2030 Positive Agriculture goals, expanding regenerative, restorative, and protective practices to 4.7 million acres globally and sustainably sourcing 70% of its key ingredients. The company has also supported approximately 224,000 people in its agricultural supply chains through various programs aimed at improving livelihoods. These advancements are driven by strong collaborations, farmer engagement, and innovation, with PepsiCo committed to further enhancing resilience and sustainability in farming communities.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Highlights Longstanding Partnership with the National Medal of Honor Museum Foundation as America Commemorates the 250th Anniversary of Its Founding
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) has reaffirmed its essential partnership with the National Medal of Honor Museum Foundation (NMOHM), emphasizing their shared mission to preserve and share the stories of Medal of Honor Recipients as America approaches its 250th anniversary. This collaboration highlights Alexandria's commitment to corporate responsibility, having significantly contributed to the establishment and success of the National Medal of Honor Museum. The Museum, which opened in March 2025 in Arlington, Texas, is dedicated to honoring Medal of Honor Recipients through immersive exhibits and educational programs, and was recently recognized as "Best New Museum" by USA Today Reader's Choice 2026.

feed.title: Micron and General Motors Sign Strategic Agreement to Secure Supply and Accelerate Innovation
feed.summary: Micron Technology and General Motors have signed a Strategic Customer Agreement (SCA) to ensure a long-term, reliable supply of memory and storage solutions crucial for GM's vehicle production. This partnership aims to strengthen semiconductor and automotive supply chains, supporting U.S. manufacturing and innovation. The agreement includes committed supply of LPDRAM, NOR, and UFS NAND products and involves deep technology collaboration for future vehicle architectures and advanced memory qualification, bolstered by Micron's investment in its Manassas, Virginia fab.

feed.title: Align Technology to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results on July 29, 2026
feed.summary: Align Technology (Nasdaq: ALGN) is scheduled to release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, after the market closes. The results will be available on the Investor Relations section of the Align website. Following the release, the company will host a conference call and audio webcast to discuss the financial outcomes.

feed.title: ICE and NATIVX plan futures for AI compute prices
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) and NATIVX have announced plans to launch GPU compute futures contracts to provide pricing transparency and risk management for the rapidly growing AI compute market. These U.S. dollar-denominated, cash-settled contracts will be based on NATIVX's COIL Index, which tracks energy-normalized, tokenized GPU compute and connectivity prices. The initiative aims to establish compute as a transparent and manageable asset class, allowing market participants to hedge GPU exposure alongside existing energy contracts.

feed.title: Hexcel Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Hexcel Corporation (NYSE: HXL) announced it will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, July 29, after the market closes. The company will host a webcast and conference call on Thursday, July 30, at 9:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results, led by Chairman, CEO and President Tom Gentile and Chief Financial Officer Jamie Coogan. The event will be accessible via Hexcel's Investor Relations webpage and by phone, with a replay available online afterward.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin contributing millions toward new White House helipad
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin is donating $5 million towards the construction of a new permanent helipad on the White House grounds. This move comes as new Marine One helicopters have exhaust vents that are reportedly damaging the White House's famous green lawn. The article highlights the involvement of President Donald Trump in moving forward with the helipad project.

feed.title: Outgoing Apple CEO Cook has 'constructive' talks about Siri AI in Europe: report (AAPL:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook recently held "constructive" virtual talks with EU tech chief Henna Virkkunen regarding the potential launch of Apple's new Siri AI in Europe. The discussions focused on how EU regulations, particularly the Digital Markets Act, might impact the AI's rollout and what risks Apple faces concerning competition fines. Siri AI aims to compete with existing chatbots like ChatGPT and Gemini, but its European availability could be affected by these regulatory hurdles.
